description: A square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' rogues-gallery template, this variant featuring an actual booking/mugshot-style portrait of the subject. The right and central portion shows a color photo of a man (medium complexion, short dark hair, mustache) in what appears to be a tan detention uniform against a dark background. A red diagonal banner in the top-right corner reads 'OMAHA' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line '2/6/2025 | Omaha, NE.' Overlaid white bold sans-serif text gives the name 'Adolfo Serrano-Hernandez,' with a 'CRIMES:' label and bulleted charge 'Attempted rape.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark appear at bottom left, and a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right. This is the standard agency propaganda layout used to publicize an immigrant's arrest; pairing a mugshot with an emphasized violent sexual charge frames detainees as dangerous offenders and justifies removals. The tweet links to ICE newsroom resources. Audience: the general public and enforcement supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/6/2025 | Omaha, NE; Adolfo Serrano-Hernandez; CRIMES: Attempted rape; OMAHA; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
